results.title: Matt ODell
highlights:
Vice President, Global Data & AI at Allegion | Artificial Intelligence · Data & Analytics · Enterprise Architecture · Core Services (CIAM, Payments & Subscriptions)
...
I am responsible for equipping Allegion's technology teams with the tools, techniques, processes and standards they need to deliver world class software around the globe. I lead teams focusing on user experience design, machine learning and predictive modeling, emerging technologies and enterprise architecture. Our goal is to introduce new technology both inside and outside or Allegion, promote consistent and maintainable solution architectures, encourage the use of well-established standards and best practices, and develop capabilities that will position Allegion as a leader in technology and design. I am also a Founding Principal of Pin & Tumbler Studio, a small batch, craftsman brand of Allegion founded in 2019 on the idea that consumers were seeking unique and innovative products that catered to their modern sense of style and design. Show less
...
I manage a team of developers and technologists responsible for finding new ways to solve business problems by building prototypes and POCs that bring clarity to the fuzzy front end of projects, finding new analytic insights from our business data, and rapidly responding to challenging technology problems. I have built this team from the ground up to deliver fast, be flexible enough to change with evolving business needs, embrace our failures as well as our successes, and partner with our internal and external colleagues to deliver innovative change. In this position I promoted the adoption of new technologies globally across the sales, marketing, customer case, order management and manufacturing functions. I led software development teams to deliver a number of new internal and customer-facing web and mobile applications. I also drove the establishment of new capabilities and processes including a UX center of excellence, a Data Science center of excellence, utilization of cloud computing (Azure), web application standardization and DevOps best practices. I am an active blogger using writing and video to present the stories of my team, and I am a regular facilitator, panelist and presenter at internal events focused on creativity, innovation, software development or change management. As leader of the Enterprise Architecture team, I promote consistent and maintainable solution architectures, encourage the use of well-established standards and best practices, and develop capabilities that will position Allegion as a leader in technology and design. Show less

results.title: Gauri Dhande
highlights:
Senior Data Scientist at Allegion India
...
Senior Data Scientist at [Allegion India](https://www.linkedin.com/company/allegion-india)
...
As a data scientist with 5 years of experience in the industry, I have a proven track record of delivering valuable insights and solutions to complex business problems. I specialize in machine learning, data modeling, statistical analysis, predictive maintaince etc. Throughout my career, I have leveraged my technical skills and analytical abilities to drive innovation and improve business performance. I am skilled in python, pyspark, PowerBI and am comfortable working with large datasets and complex analytics problems. I have experience in data preprocessing, exploratory data analysis, feature engineering, predictive modeling, and have a solid understanding of statistics, data visualization, and deep learning. My ability to communicate complex data insights to both technical and non-technical stakeholders has allowed me to drive change and make a real impact on the organizations I have worked with. I am passionate about using data to solve business challenges and am always looking for new opportunities to apply my skills and expertise. If you are looking for a data scientist with a strong analytical background and a proven ability to deliver results, I would love to connect with you. This summary effectively showcases your skills, experience, and accomplishments as a data scientist, while also demonstrating your passion for the field and your willingness to collaborate and explore new opportunities.
...
### Senior Data Scientist at [Allegion India](https://www.linkedin.com/company/allegion-india) (Current)
...
Fetched complex datasets from various sources and analyze and interpret data, acquainted with practical hand-on data exploratory and descriptive analysis using data visualization techniques such as charts and plots using PowerBI and python graphical libraries Collaborated with cross-functional teams to understand the business requirements and formulate into clear and concise technical problem statements. Specifically worked on failure modes and fault codes detection using classification algorithms. Conducted in-depth data visualization and storytelling to communicate complex analytical findings to stakeholders, facilitating understanding and driving data-driven decision-making across the organization Led the end-to-end development and deployment of predictive models, including data collection, cleaning, model selection, feature engineering, model training, and evaluation, resulting in improved accuracy. Conducted extensive data exploration, preprocessing, and feature engineering on large datasets using Python, SQL, and R, resulting in improved data quality and increased model performance. Built end-to-end deployment pipeline in Spark using Azure Databricks and MLOps tools like MLFlow and collaborated and maintained of codes on Github and Azure Repos that let the machine learning model deployed in production environment. Performed Unit Testing (Pytests), and deployment of machine learning models solutions in Azure Devops using a CI/CD pipeline using sklearn and MLlib and tuning the hyperparameters using Hyperopt library. Mentored and provided technical guidance to junior data scientists, facilitating their professional growth and fostering a collaborative and innovative team environment.
...

# Principal Technical Program Manager – Core Services & Enterprise Architecture
...
Posted Jun 20, 2026
...
Full-time
...
At Allegion, we help keep the people you know and love safe and secure where they live, work and visit. With more than 30 brands, 12,000+ employees globally and products sold in 130 countries, we specialize in security around the doorway and beyond. Additionally, in 2024 we were awarded the Gallup Exceptional Workplace Award, which recognizes the most engaged workplace cultures in the world.
...
Principal Technical Program Manager – Core Services & Enterprise Architecture
...
The Principal Technical Program Manager (TPM) for Core Services & Enterprise Architecture is a strategic partner across IT and business organizations, responsible for the vision, roadmap, and strategy of foundational software and services that power Allegion’s technology ecosystem. You will move beyond simple coordination to architecting program frameworks that ensure scalability, security, and performance. As a TPM for Core Services, you will be the primary intersection between product and business stakeholders, enterprise IT, and Core Services engineering teams aligning complex technical dependencies across global teams and ensuring that our core infrastructure enables rapid innovation for internal business partners to meet customer needs. As a TPM for Enterprise Architecture, you will be a business advocate for enterprise architecture tooling and processes enabling rapid innovation for internal business partners to meet customer needs and impact overall company direction.

highlights:
Software Engineer AI/ML – Office of Career Strategy – Yale University
...
# Software Engineer AI/ML
...
The CES Business Intelligence team is building the next generation of AI-powered solutions for commercial, contracts, and operations. We’re looking for an AI Engineer to help transform GE Aerospace operational data into production-grade machine learning pipelines, models, and LLM-powered applications.
...
This is a multi-faceted engineering role. You’ll spend most of your time developing AI/ML products by training models, developing applications, and creating APIs. You will partner closely with analytics teams to enable AI within our existing operational tools. You’ll also contribute to AI strategy and partner with executive stakeholders to align on requirements, success metrics, and business impact. We’re looking for someone who’s excited to expand their technical skillset in AI/ML and deliver advanced solutions that directly impact daily operations.
...
What you’ll do: Design, build, deliver, and maintain AI/ML products including LLM-powered applications, forecasting models, anomaly detection systems, and intelligent agents. Own the full AI/ML lifecycle: requirements analysis, model design, training, evaluation, API development, deployment, and operational support. Convert complex operational datasets into scalable AI capabilities that enable real-time decision support.
...

...
- Collaborate with BI team to embed AI features into existing applications that enable natural language queries, predictive insights, and intelligent recommendations directly within user-facing applications

results.title: Johnson Controls – Associate Software Engineer (Data Scientist) - Job Society
highlights:
Johnson Controls is seeking a talented and passionate Associate Software Engineer – Data Scientist to join its Data Science & AI team in Pune. This role is an excellent opportunity for aspiring data science professionals who want to work on advanced machine learning, artificial intelligence, and cloud-based analytics solutions. As part of a global technology-driven organization, you will contribute to building intelligent systems that transform complex business challenges into data-driven solutions. The position offers exposure to cutting-edge technologies including machine learning, deep learning, generative AI, cloud computing, and MLOps, making it an ideal opportunity for professionals looking to accelerate their careers in the rapidly evolving field of data science.
...
In this role, you will collaborate with data engineers, AI specialists, cloud architects, and business stakeholders to develop scalable machine learning models and AI-powered applications. You will work extensively with Python, SQL, Microsoft Azure, Azure Machine Learning, Azure Databricks, and Azure OpenAI services to create intelligent solutions that generate measurable business value. The position involves the complete machine learning lifecycle, including data preparation, feature engineering, model development, deployment, monitoring, and optimization. By leveraging advanced analytics and cloud-native technologies, you will help build predictive and automated systems that improve operational efficiency and business decision-making.
...
The Associate Software Engineer – Data Scientist role provides an exceptional platform for learning and innovation. Johnson Controls encourages continuous skill development through mentorship programs, certification sponsorships, and hands-on exposure to enterprise-scale AI and machine learning projects. You will gain experience working with modern technologies such as Generative AI, Natural Language Processing (NLP), Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), deep learning frameworks, and cloud-based MLOps solutions. This position is ideal for candidates who are eager to solve real-world business problems using data, artificial intelligence, and advanced analytics while contributing to transformative technology initiatives within a globally recognized organization.
...
• Design, develop
...
learning models for classification, regression, forecasting, recommendation systems, and predictive analytics use cases.
...
• Utilize Azure OpenAI and other AI services to develop intelligent applications, automation solutions, and generative AI-powered business capabilities.
...
• Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Data Science, Artificial Intelligence, Engineering, Mathematics, Statistics, or a related field.
...
• Experience working with deep learning frameworks such as TensorFlow or PyTorch for developing AI and neural network-based solutions.
...
• Understanding of Natural Language Processing (NLP), large language models, Hugging Face libraries, spaCy, NLTK, or related AI technologies is advantageous.
...
• Knowledge of Generative AI, Azure OpenAI, LangChain, Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), and prompt engineering concepts will be highly beneficial.
...
The expected salary for an Associate Software Engineer – Data Scientist at Johnson Controls in Pune typically ranges between ₹8 LPA and ₹16 LPA, depending on educational background, technical expertise, project experience, cloud certifications, and machine learning proficiency. Candidates with strong Azure cloud knowledge, hands-on AI and machine learning experience, deep learning expertise, and exposure to Generative AI technologies may receive compensation toward the higher end of the range, along with performance incentives, certification sponsorships, learning benefits, and long-term career growth opportunities.

results.title: Principal Data Engineer, LLM/AI Platforms (Remote) at CrowdStrike | Jeremy
highlights:
Principal Data Engineer, LLM/AI Platforms (Remote) at CrowdStrike | Jeremy
...
Principal Data Engineer, LLM/AI Platforms (Remote) at CrowdStrike | Jeremy
[Back to Jobs](https://tryjeremy.com/jobs)
...
[CrowdStrikecrowdstrike.com](https://tryjeremy.com/companies/crowdstrike)# Principal Data Engineer, LLM/AI Platforms (Remote)
...
Principal-level data engineer leading the design and deployment of LLM/AI infrastructure at exabyte scale for CrowdStrike's next-generation security platform, with hands-on expertise in agentic workflows, RAG systems, and distributed data processing.
...
## Job description
...
CrowdStrike is looking for a Principal Data Engineer with deep expertise in Large Language Models (LLMs) and AI platforms to join our growing Data Science Platform Engineering Team. You will be a key leader, responsible for designing, building, and deploying cutting-edge data infrastructure that powers our next generation of AI-driven security products. This role requires significant hands-on experience in LLM integration, agentic workflows, and agent harnessing to deliver high-impact, scalable solutions. You will champion engineering excellence, focusing on shipping fast, writing elegant, high-quality code, and actively mentoring and strengthening the team's technical knowledge and capabilities.
...
* Architect, implement, and optimize data platforms and pipelines specifically designed to support LLMs, Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), and sophisticated AI agentic systems at Exabyte scale.
...
* Drive the adoption and deployment of agentic workflows and agent harnessing techniques to create autonomous, data-driven security features.
...
* Design and implement highly scalable,
...
* Provide technical leadership and deep expertise in data modeling, normalization, and semantic cataloging for AI/ML workloads.
...
* Establish best practices for MLOps/DataOps surrounding LLMs, including monitoring, observability, and zero-touch recovery mechanisms for AI services.
...
* Actively mentor engineers, conducting technical workshops, leading design reviews, and strengthening the team's knowledge in cutting-edge AI platform technologies.
...
### Tech Stack (Expertise in several key areas is expected):
...
* MLOps Tools (MLflow, Sagemaker, Vertex AI)
* Experience with common agentic workflow frameworks (e.g., LangChain, LlamaIndex).
* Expert-level proficiency in a high-level coding language (Python, or JVM technologies).
* Deep experience with distributed data processing frameworks (e.g., Spark, Dask, Flink).
* Strong expertise with cloud platforms (AWS, GCP, or OCI) and related data services.
* Containerization and orchestration mastery (Docker, Kubernetes).
* Message queuing and streaming technologies (Kafka, Pulsar).
* Data Warehousing (Snowflake, BigQuery) and Data Orchestration (Airflow, Kubeflow).
...
### What You'll Need:
...
* Master’s degree or PhD in Computer Science, Data Engineering, or a related STEM field, or equivalent practical experience.
...
* 10+ years of progressive experience in Data Engineering/Platform Engineering, with at least 3 years focused on architecting and building platforms for AI/ML or Data Science at massive scale.
...
* Demonstrable hands-on experience in LLM engineering (fine-tuning, prompt engineering, deployment), RAG, and developing agentic workflows.
...
* Proven track record of designing and delivering large-scale distributed systems (sharding, partitioning, concurrency).
...
* Direct experience building, deploying, and managing LLMs in a production environment.
* Prior experience in the cybersecurity, intelligence, or high-compliance industries.
* Contributions to open-source projects related to data or AI/ML.
...

equitable compensation practices.

results.title: Principal Industrial AI Data Architect - US Remote | Hirequorum
highlights:
Principal Industrial AI Data Architect - US Remote | Hirequorum
...
# Principal Industrial AI Data Architect - US Remote
...
### Position Overview
...
The Principal Industrial AI Data Architect is responsible for designing and governing the data architecture that enables reliable, scalable AI across industrial environments.
...
This role ensures that:
...
Data pipelines are aligned with the canonical semantic model
...
Features used in AI models are consistent across training and runtime
...
Industrial data is structured for real-time inference and long-term analytics
...
This role is the bridge between data, semantics, and AI execution.
...
Job Responsibilities
...
1. Define Industrial Data Architecture for AI
...
Edge systems → cloud → AI pipelines → edge inference
...
2. Design Feature Pipelines and Delivery for AI Models
...
Design and govern the pipelines, storage, and lifecycle that build and deliver features to AI models, based on canonical definitions established by the Principal Manufacturing & Semantic Architect.
...
Define feature engineering pipelines for both training (cloud) and inference (edge) environments
...
Ensure consistency between training datasets and runtime inference data
...
Prevent feature drift and data mismatch through automated validation
...
3. Integrate Semantic Model with Data Pipelines
...
4. Enable Scalable AI Model Integration
...
Define data interfaces required by:
...
Internal AI teams
...
External model providers
...
5. Design for Multi-Tenant and Product Use Cases
...
6. Collaborate Across Teams
...
AI/Data Science teams (model requirements and validation)
...
Strong system design and data modeling skills
...
Ability to connect business, operational, and AI requirements
...
Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or related field (Master's preferred)
...
10+ years of experience in data architecture, industrial data systems, or IoT platforms
...
Strong experience with time-series data (e.g., historian systems), data pipelines, and ETL/ELT
...
Strong experience with distributed data systems
...
Understanding of AI/ML data requirements and feature engineering concepts
...
Experience with:
...
Industrial IoT or edge-to-cloud platforms
...
OT + IT integration
...
Cloud data platforms (
...
Operate as a thought leader in industrial data architecture and AI data strategy
...
Drive standards adoption for data pipelines and AI data practices across internal and external stakeholders
...
One-Line Summary
...
Design the data architecture that ensures AI models operate correctly, consistently, and at scale across industrial environments.

Join arenaflex, and you'll be part of a team that's changing the world one innovation at a time. We are currently seeking a talented and passionate Data Scientist to join our Cloud Technologies Application Platform team and help us build the future of developer experience through cutting-edge artificial intelligence solutions.
...
Are you ready to take your career to the next level with a company that values innovation and excellence? arenaflex is looking for an experienced Data Scientist to join our dynamic team as an AI/Machine Learning Developer. In this role, you will be instrumental in designing and executing our artificial intelligence strategy to elevate our developer experience platform to unprecedented heights.
...
This is a unique opportunity to work at the forefront of generative AI technology, collaborating with multidisciplinary teams to develop innovative solutions that will transform how developers create applications at arenaflex. You'll leverage your expertise in machine learning, deep learning, and large language models to solve complex business challenges and drive measurable impact across the organization.
...
As a Data Scientist at arenaflex, you will be responsible for driving our AI initiatives and contributing to the development of next-generation developer tools. Your key responsibilities will include:
...
Design, develop, and implement machine learning models and algorithms that enhance our developer experience platform, ensuring alignment with arenaflex's overall technology strategy.
...
Build, train, and fine-tune machine learning models, including foundation models and large language models, to address various business problems and improve developer productivity.
...
Choose appropriate machine learning algorithms, train models, and calibrate hyperparameters to achieve optimal predictive performance and model accuracy.
...
Apply deep expertise in transformer architecture, vector embeddings, and advanced ML techniques to develop solutions that solve complex business challenges.
...
Lead model deployment for experimentation, implementing A/B testing, monitoring model performance, and iterating on solutions based on empirical results.
...
Work closely with AI engineers, software developers, product managers, and other data scientists to deliver end-to-end AI-enabled solutions.
...
Experience with training models or utilizing foundation models and fine-tuning them to meet custom business requirements.
...
Bachelor's degree in Data Science, Computer Science, Statistics, Mathematics, or a
...
Minimum of 5+ years of progressive experience in the software industry with a focused specialization in machine learning and artificial intelligence.
...
Strong understanding and extensive experience with cutting-edge machine learning algorithms, deep learning architectures, statistical modeling, and large language models.
...
- Advanced degree (Master's or PhD) in Data Science, Computer Science, or related field

- Experience applying machine learning techniques specifically in developer productivity or software development lifecycle contexts

- Knowledge of cloud platforms and infrastructure (AWS, Azure, or Google Cloud)

- Familiarity with MLOps practices and deployment pipelines

- Published research or contributions to open-source machine learning projects

- Experience with prompt engineering and LLM optimization techniques
...
If you are passionate about artificial intelligence, machine learning, and want to work on projects that will shape the future of technology, arenaflex is the place for you. We are looking for individuals who bring enthusiasm, dedication, and fresh perspectives to their work – people who are ready to push boundaries and achieve extraordinary results.

valuable but also usable,

Together, we are redefining how the world safeguards data, enabling organizations to thrive in a GenAI era where data is the ultimate currency. If you're ready to shape the future of data security, Protegrity is the place for you.
...
Protegrity is seeking a Machine Learning Engineer (PhD or Master’s degree required) to join our GenAI team at a pivotal moment in the market. As enterprises race to adopt Generative AI, securing AI workflows, data, and privacy has become mission‑critical, and Protegrity is at the forefront of making GenAI safe for real world, enterprise use.

This role is designed for a PhD or Master’s graduate with 2+ years of GenAI experience (or equivalent advanced research or technical projects), who wants to work hands‑on building secure AI workflows and agentic systems in a highly collaborative, hybrid/in‑office environment.
